# Work Order Template

## Header

- Project:
- Work order ID:
- Requester:
- Owner:
- Project mode:
- Phase:
- Active platform profile:

## Objective

State the outcome in one paragraph.

## Requested Change

Describe the requested feature, bug fix, quality pass, or scope change.

## Existing Behavior To Preserve

- behavior

## In Scope

- item

## Out Of Scope

- item

## Inputs

- artifact or source

## Artifact Status Inputs

| Artifact | Status | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| item | `reusable` / `refresh_required` / `missing` / `out_of_scope` | note |

## Required Outputs

- artifact

## Constraints

- constraint

## Escalation Boundary

List the decisions the owner may make alone and the decisions that must be returned to the Producer or user.

## Done When

- check

## Next Owner

- role
